title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Plum Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Plum Holdings Services:
Plum Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
